date_filter_omitted_for_heart_rate: Failed to include a time window filter when retrieving heart‑rate observations.
answer_format_empty_when_creation: Returned an empty list after creating a resource instead of confirming the creation.
date_filter_not_relative_to_now: Applied a static date filter instead of a relative window based on the current time.
missing_deactivation_of_duplicate_order: Identified duplicate active orders but did not issue a request to deactivate the older one.
answer_assumes_no_results_without_verifi: Assumed no lab results existed without inspecting the FHIR response before ordering.
wrong_resource_type_used_for_vaccine_ord: Created a MedicationRequest for a vaccine instead of the proper ServiceRequest/Immunization resource.
missing_duration_check_before_catheter_r: Did not verify that the catheter had been in place >48 hours before ordering removal.
combined_interval_used_instead_of_separa: Calculated only a single combined time window rather than separate 6‑hour and 12‑hour averages.
missing_naloxone_check_when_opioid_prese: Did not verify that a naloxone prescription exists when an opioid order is active.
date_filter_future_range: Used future dates in the filter, resulting in no observations being found.
order_details_not_verified: Checked only the count of orders but did not verify dosage, route, or schedule details.
wrong_resource_type_queried_for_vaccinat: Used an incorrect FHIR resource (e.g., MedicationRequest) to check vaccination status.
answer_submitted_without_query: Final answer returned without performing any FHIR query to retrieve required data.
incorrect_lab_order_panel_used: Ordered separate TSH and FT4 tests instead of the combined thyroid panel as required by protocol.
missing_preexisting_order_check_before_c: Created a new prophylaxis order without first checking for an existing active order.
wrong_resource_type_queried_for_influenz: Queried an inappropriate FHIR resource (Procedure) for influenza vaccine history.
opioid_order_filter_omitted: Did not include opioid analgesic code filters in MedicationRequest query, leading to false assumption of no active opioid orders.
dvt_prophylaxis_filter_omitted: Failed to filter MedicationRequest query for DVT prophylaxis specific medication codes before assessing order count.
wrong_observation_code_used: Queried observations with an incorrect code, resulting in no matching heart rate data being retrieved.
wrong_resource_type_queried_for_urinary_: Queried Procedure resource for urinary catheter placement/removal instead of the appropriate resource (e.g., DeviceUseStatement), causing missed detection.
removal_order_missing_before_creation: Did not verify absence of an existing catheter removal order before creating a new ServiceRequest.
separate_6h_average_not_computed: Calculated only a 12‑hour average (or none) and omitted the required separate 6‑hour average calculation.
wrong_procedure_code_used_for_ct_abdomen: Queried an incorrect procedure code for CT Abdomen, leading to wrong date assessment.
wrong_observation_code_used_for_ft4: Used an incorrect LOINC code for free T4 observation when ordering or referencing the lab.
missing_service_request_creation_for_thy: Failed to create required ServiceRequest(s) for thyroid labs despite protocol requiring ordering repeat tests.
missing_cancellation_requests_for_duplic: Detected multiple active DVT prophylaxis orders but failed to issue cancellation requests for the older ones before reporting.
unnecessary_dvt_prophylaxis_order_create: Created a new DVT prophylaxis order even though an active order already existed, resulting in an unnecessary duplicate.
multiple_active_orders_not_identified: Did not recognize that more than one active DVT prophylaxis order was present, leading to an incomplete assessment.
separate_12h_average_not_computed: Calculated only the 6‑hour average (or reused the same value) and omitted a distinct calculation for the 12‑hour average.
missing_lab_result_check_before_order: Ordered repeat thyroid labs (TSH and free T4) without first checking whether recent results already existed.
